U_OTH_SNF_DAY Total number of Medicare Skilled Nursing Facility covered days during months of 'Other' Dual Status* XXX
 U_OTH_PAC_OTH_DAY Total number of Medicare Post-Acute Care covered days during months of 'Other' Dual Status* XXX
 U_OTH_HOSPICE_DAY Total number of Medicare Hospice covered days during months of 'Other' Dual Status* XXX
 U_OTH_HOP_VST Total number of Medicare Hospital Outpatient visits during months of 'Other' Dual Status XXX
 U_OTH_PHYS_VST Total number of Medicare Physician
